table_introductions.table_introduction: v_master_ne_all stores business records used for analysis and reporting. It includes fields such as record_type, division, segment, order_date, business_month, report_date, uuid, position_code. Use this table for filtering, aggregation, and trend exploration.

v_master_ne_parlor stores business records used for analysis and reporting. It includes fields such as record_type, division, segment, order_date, business_month, report_date, uuid, position_code. Use this table for filtering, aggregation, and trend exploration.

v_master_ne_retail stores business records used for analysis and reporting. It includes fields such as record_type, division, segment, order_date, business_month, report_date, uuid, position_code. Use this table for filtering, aggregation, and trend exploration.
